'''kangudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaama|kaama]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaama|kaama]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kangudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kængidhith|kængidhith]] || [[word:kængidhij|kængidhij]] || [[word:kængidhish|kængidhish]] || [[word:kængidhi|kængidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangungudhuth|kangungudhuth]] || [[word:kangungudhuj|kangungudhuj]] || [[word:kangungudhush|kangungudhush]] || [[word:kangungudhu|kangungudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangudhuth|kangudhuth]] || [[word:kangudhuj|kangudhuj]] || [[word:kangudhush|kangudhush]] || [[word:kangudhu|kangudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangufdhuth|kangufdhuth]] || [[word:kangufdhuj|kangufdhuj]] || [[word:kangufdhush|kangufdhush]] || [[word:kangufdhuf|kangufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kangudhuthu|kangudhuthu]] || [[word:kangudhuju|kangudhuju]] || [[word:kangudhushu|kangudhushu]] || [[word:kangudhuku|kangudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kangudhuth|kangudhuth]] || [[word:kangudhuj|kangudhuj]] || [[word:kangudhush|kangudhush]] || [[word:kangudhu|kangudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kangudhuthul|kangudhuthul]] || [[word:kangudhujul|kangudhujul]] || [[word:kangudhushul|kangudhushul]] || [[word:kangudhukul|kangudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kangudhuthuthu|kangudhuthuthu]] || [[word:kangudhujuju|kangudhujuju]] || [[word:kangudhushushu|kangudhushushu]] || [[word:kangudhuku|kangudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kangudhuthun|kangudhuthun]] || [[word:kangudhujun|kangudhujun]] || [[word:kangudhushun|kangudhushun]] || [[word:kangudhukun|kangudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kangudhuthuoro|kangudhuthuoro]] || [[word:kangudhujuoro|kangudhujuoro]] || [[word:kangudhushuoro|kangudhushuoro]] || [[word:kangudhukuoro|kangudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
